languages.text: "Еще одно свидетельство экспедиции Себериана, Ваша Светлость. Еще один верный слуга династии, отдавший жизнь за своего Лорд-капитана". {n}Голос Абеляра полнится гордостью при виде почившего члена свиты.{/n}

"Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Еще одно свидетельство экспедиции Себериана, Ваша Светлость. Еще один верный слуга династии, отдавший жизнь за своего Лорд-капитана". {n}Голос Абеляра полнится гордостью при виде почившего члена свиты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

"Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

"Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

languages.text: 「シベリアンの遠征の証拠がさらに増えました、御{mf|殿|女}様。この忠実な家臣は、主である船長のために命を捧げました。」{n}アベルアルドは、この亡くなった家臣を見て、誇らしげに声をあげます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアンの遠征の証拠がさらに増えました、御{mf|殿|女}様。この忠実な家臣は、主である船長のために命を捧げました。」{n}アベルアルドは、この亡くなった家臣を見て、誇らしげに声をあげます。{/n}

languages.text: "Seberian'ın seferine dair bir kanıt daha {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Lord Kaptanı uğruna hayatını veren, hanedanlığın bir başka sadık hizmetkârı." {n}Abelard'ın sesi, bu merhum maiyet mensubunu görünce gururla yankılanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın seferine dair bir kanıt daha {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Lord Kaptanı uğruna hayatını veren, hanedanlığın bir başka sadık hizmetkârı." {n}Abelard'ın sesi, bu merhum maiyet mensubunu görünce gururla yankılanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Más pruebas de la expedición de Seberian, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Otro sirviente leal de la dinastía que dio su vida por su Lord Capitán». {n}La voz de Abelard resuena con orgullo ante el fallecido miembro del séquito de Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Más pruebas de la expedición de Seberian, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Otro sirviente leal de la dinastía que dio su vida por su Lord Capitán». {n}La voz de Abelard resuena con orgullo ante el fallecido miembro del séquito de Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: “塞贝里安探险队的又一铁证，大人。又一位为他的舰长大人捐躯的王朝忠仆。”{n}看着这位死去的随从成员，阿贝拉德的声音中回荡着自豪。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安探险队的又一铁证，大人。又一位为他的舰长大人捐躯的王朝忠仆。”{n}看着这位死去的随从成员，阿贝拉德的声音中回荡着自豪。{/n}

languages.text: « Encore une trace de l'expédition de Seberian, Votre Seigneurie. Un autre fidèle serviteur de la dynastie qui s'est sacrifié au nom de son seigneur-capitaine, » {n}déclare Abélard avec fierté en regardant la dépouille de ce membre de l'entourage du libre-marchand.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Encore une trace de l'expédition de Seberian, Votre Seigneurie. Un autre fidèle serviteur de la dynastie qui s'est sacrifié au nom de son seigneur-capitaine, » {n}déclare Abélard avec fierté en regardant la dépouille de ce membre de l'entourage du libre-marchand.{/n}

languages.text: "Ein weiterer Beweis für Seberians Expedition, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ein weiterer treuer Diener der Dynastie, der für seinen Lord Captain starb." {n}Abelards Stimme ist angesichts dieses verstorbenen Kriegers von Stolz erfüllt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yet more evidence of Seberian's expedition, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Another loyal servant of the dynasty who gave his life for his Lord Captain." {n}Abelard's voice resounds with pride at the sight of this deceased retinue member.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ein weiterer Beweis für Seberians Expedition, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ein weiterer treuer Diener der Dynastie, der für seinen Lord Captain starb." {n}Abelards Stimme ist angesichts dieses verstorbenen Kriegers von Stolz erfüllt.{/n}
